title: Fetch more Discord history for VC ID

log.context: Fetch more Discord history for VC ID

The exact voice channel ID found in jaboostin's message from 2026-03-28 01:57 is **13255677000299315**. That's 17 digits, which is indeed a valid Discord snowflake ID (they range from 17-19 digits depending on when the resource was created; older ones are shorter).
